ground_truth.title: Consulting news in the USA
ground_truth.main_content:
The latest news in the consulting industry in the USA. An overview of consulting news, research and firm updates.

TCS to acquire Salesforce consultancy Coastal Cloud in $700-million deal
Tata Consultancy Services (TCS), an India-headquartered IT consulting firm, has agreed to acquire Coastal Cloud, a Palm Coast, FL-based Salesforce consulting firm, for an all-cash consideration of $7
19 December 2025

Anders launches business transformation offering
Anders, a St. Louis-based accounting and consulting firm, has launched a new business transformation service line.
19 December 2025

Spare capacity persists in global supply chains in November
Spare capacity persisted in global supply chains in November, according to GEP’s monthly Global Supply Chain Volatility Index report. The headline index rose slightly to -0.29 in November from -0.
18 December 2025

DXC launches global advisory and consulting group ‘AdvisoryX’
DXC Technology, an Ashburn, VA-headquartered IT consulting firm, on Wednesday announced the launch of AdvisoryX, a global advisory and consulting group focusing on solving strategic, operational, and
12 December 2025

BDO launches government services subsidiary
BDO USA has launched BDO Government Services, a wholly owned subsidiary serving state and municipal clients in the continental US and Puerto Rico.
12 December 2025

ValuStrat launches its Online Business Valuation platform in US market
ValuStrat, an international real estate consulting firm, has launched its Online Business Valuation platform in the US market.
11 December 2025

FTI Consulting appoints Rike Rabl as chief human resources officer
FTI Consulting, a Washington, DC-headquartered management consulting firm, has appointed Rike Rabl as its chief human resources officer (CHRO), effective January 1, 2026.
11 December 2025

PA Consulting hires Lenka Hennessy as partner in US transport practice
PA Consulting, a London-headquartered innovation and transformation consulting firm, has hired Lenka Hennessy as a partner in its US transport practice in Washington, DC.
11 December 2025

Vantage Leadership Consulting appoints Jacqueline Ackerman as managing partner
Vantage Leadership Consulting, a Chicago-based leadership consulting firm, has appointed Jacqueline Ackerman as its managing partner.
10 December 2025

Tax consultancy Andersen announces launch of IPO
Andersen, a San Francisco-headquartered tax consulting firm, on Monday announced the launch of the roadshow for its proposed initial public offering (IPO).
10 December 2025

Arthur D. Little launches joint venture with Vega IT
Arthur D. Little (ADL), a Brussels-headquartered management consulting firm, has formed Axceler8 Solutions, a 50/50 joint venture with Vega IT, a Serbia-based software development firm.
09 December 2025

J.S. Held buys project management firm GLI Advisors
J.S. Held, a Jericho, NY-based technical and forensic advisory firm, has acquired GLI Advisors, a Bend, OR-based construction project management consulting firm.
09 December 2025

Optomi Professional Services promotes Nick Murphy to COO
Optomi Professional Services (OPS), an Atlanta-based IT consulting and staffing firm, has promoted Nick Murphy to chief operating officer.
08 December 2025

Anchin adds Jean David Chery as tax partner
Anchin, a New York-based accounting and consulting firm, has hired Jean David Chery as a tax partner in its architecture, engineering, and construction sector practice.
08 December 2025

BRG hires Richard Bajner to lead integrated health solutions practice
Berkeley Research Group (BRG), an Emeryville, CA-based management consulting firm, has hired Richard Bajner as a managing director and head of its integrated health solutions (IHS) practice.
05 December 2025

Michelle Chen joins SolomonEdwards to grow search practice
Michelle Chen, an experienced recruiting industry leader, has joined business consulting firm SolomonEdwards as a managing partner.
05 December 2025

The Gunter Group expands into Nashville
The Gunter Group (TGG), a Portland, OR-based management consulting firm, has expanded into the Southeast with a new office in Nashville.
04 December 2025

YA Group launches planning and construction advisory division
YA Group, a Nashville-based building consulting and forensic engineering firm, has launched a new planning and construction advisory services (PCAS) division.
04 December 2025

BCG senior partner Amanda Brimmer joins JLL as head of corporate development
Amanda Brimmer, a former senior partner at Boston Consulting Group, has joined commercial real estate services firm JLL as head of corporate development and CFO for leasing advisory.
03 December 2025

Ankura adds healthcare consultant Charles Baker as senior managing director
Ankura, a New York-based advisory and forensic accounting firm, has hired Charles Baker as a senior managing director and head of the payer government programs compliance and operations practice.
03 December 2025

Kearney outlook report finds global economy on ‘unsteady ground’
Kearney’s 2H Global Economic Outlook 2025-2027 – titled “Unsteady Ground” – expects a period of structural volatility defined by slowing growth and intensifying fragmentation.
02 December 2025

EY-Parthenon expects M&A activity will grow in 2026
EY-Parthenon, the strategy arm of accounting firm EY, projects continued deal volume growth in 2026 for both corporate and private equity (PE) mergers and acquisitions.
02 December 2025

Consumers interested in home robots, but not willing to pay up yet
Two-thirds of American consumers (65%) are interested in owning an advanced home robot, according to Altman Solon’s first annual Home Robotics Survey, but most aren’t yet ready to pay the required hi
01 December 2025

Over half of US workers report burnout
Over half (55%) of US workers are experiencing burnout, according to a report from Eagle Hill Consulting. The survey, which was conducted by Ipsos in November, polled 1,400 employees in the US.
01 December 2025

Cyberonix opens new headquarters in Los Angeles
Cyberonix, a Los Angeles-based cybersecurity consulting firm, has opened a new headquarters in the city’s Westside.
with: The latest news in the consulting industry in the USA. An overview of consulting news, research and firm updates.
TCS to acquire Salesforce consultancy Coastal Cloud in $700-million deal
Kearney outlook report finds global economy on ‘unsteady ground’
Over half (55%) of US workers are experiencing burnout, according to a report from Eagle Hill Consulting.
